## SAF1.4. Rate of separation minima infringements (SMIs) (PI#2)

At State level, Greece reported 68 separation minima infringements (SMI) in their airspace during 2025. The rate of separation minima infringements was higher than Union-wide average (8.25 vs 7.10). At ANSP level, Greece reported 68 SMIs with ATS/CNS contribution. The rate of separation minima infringements at ANSP level was higher than the Union-wide average (8.25 vs 6.0).

When comparing to 2024, the rate of separation minima infringements has decreased at both State level (8.25 vs 9.05) and at ANSP level (8.25 vs 9.05).
